summary: Full testing of CPM Calculator — public /tools/cpm-calculator and portal sidebar. All 17 scenarios passed. Backend: 7/7 pytest tests passed. Frontend: all critical flows verified including email gate, results reveal, correct CPM math ($1.0375), back navigation, and portal STEP 1 OF 4.
critical_code_review_comments: CPMSaveRequest.inputs field is required (not optional) — frontend always sends it, OK
No division-by-zero: calcFixed guards miles>0, calcVariable guards mpg>0 and tireMiles>0
Email gate fires async fetch fire-and-forget (catch ignored) — MailerLite failures are silent, acceptable design
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paid user session sess_paid_1773353168 still valid and has cohort access. Public CPM at /tools/cpm-calculator: 3-step flow with email gate working. Portal CPM: 4-step flow no gate, saves to MongoDB. Total CPM $1.0375 verified with test inputs (truckPayment=1800, insurance=1200, miles=10000, diesel=3.85, mpg=7, maint=0.12, tires=18, costPerTire=450, tireMiles=120000).
